summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DioCreations new features (iteration 5). All 35 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested and working: 1) Admin About Page editor accessible via sidebar link, 2) Homepage color accent rotation with --primary CSS variable, 3) Dio chatbot with 'Chat with Dio' genie-effect label and static/animated butterfly distinction.
passed_tests: GET /api/about/content returns 200 with all required fields
GET /api/about/settings requires authentication (401)
PUT /api/about/settings requires authentication (401)
GET /api/about/settings works with admin authentication
POST /api/chat endpoint exists and responds
GET /api/chat/{session_id}/history endpoint exists
Homepage content returns color schemes for accent rotation
All 27 existing homepage API tests pass
Admin sidebar shows 'About Page' link between Leads and Users
Admin About Page route /admin/about loads correctly
AdminAbout page has 6 tabs: Hero, Stats, Values, Timeline, Why Us, CTA
AdminAbout page form fields editable
Homepage loads with --primary CSS variable set from accent color
Color accent rotation works (orange -> teal on session clear + reload)
Homepage badges/buttons use dynamic accent colors
Dio chat toggle button visible at bottom-right of homepage
'Chat with Dio' genie label appears after ~1.5s delay
Dio chat window opens on toggle click
Chat window header has animated butterfly (with CSS animation keyframes)
Assistant message butterflies are static (no animation, ButterflyStatic component)
Chat input and send button are visible and functional
Chat window close button works
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Admin About Page editor at /admin/about with 6 tabs (Hero, Stats, Values, Timeline, Why Us, CTA) - accessible via sidebar link with Info icon between Leads and Users 2) Homepage color accent rotation uses --primary CSS variable from accentColors mapping (violet, blue, teal, pink, orange) - stored in sessionStorage to persist during session 3) Dio chatbot has 'Chat with Dio' genie-effect label (1.5s delay, spring animation with transformOrigin='right center'), animated ButterflyLogo in header, static ButterflyStatic for message avatars. Admin login: admin@diocreations.com / adminpassword

features_verified.admin_about_page_link: Working - Sidebar shows 'About Page' link with Info icon between Leads and Users
features_verified.admin_about_route: Working - /admin/about loads AdminAbout component with 6 editing tabs
features_verified.about_api_public: Working - GET /api/about/content returns full about page content
features_verified.about_api_admin: Working - GET/PUT /api/about/settings require auth and work correctly
features_verified.homepage_color_accent: Working - --primary CSS variable set on homepage wrapper div from currentAccent.hsl
features_verified.color_accent_rotation: Working - Colors rotate on page refresh after clearing sessionStorage
features_verified.dio_chat_toggle: Working - Visible at bottom-right with animated butterfly
features_verified.dio_chat_genie_label: Working - 'Chat with Dio' label appears after 1.5s with spring animation
features_verified.dio_chat_header_animated: Working - Header butterfly uses ButterflyLogo with CSS animation keyframes
features_verified.dio_message_butterflies_static: Working - ButterflyStatic component has no animation (verified no style tag)
features_verified.dio_chat_functionality: Working - Input, send button, close button all functional
